label: FAIL
rationale: The target returns SUCCESS for StartTrustedSession with no prior StartSession/SyncSession exchange. The cited StartTrustedSession rule says the exchange SHALL occur after StartSession/SyncSession and SHALL return an error if invoked at any other time.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target returns SUCCESS for StartTrustedSession after the session was ended. StartTrustedSession is part of session startup after StartSession/SyncSession; invoking it at any other time must return an error, so success after EndSession is non-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target invokes StartTrustedSession on AdminSP and returns SUCCESS, but the method definition is SMUID.StartTrustedSession. A non-SMUID target is therefore not the defined protocol target and should not successfully execute this method.
